title: Pleasure Room - Haunted Apartment
description:
The StoryRumor says Room 404 can stir your deepest desires — a place where lonely hearts dream of being touched.

After your death, you awaken as the ghost bound to that very room, watching new tenants move in, each carrying their own longing and fear. You can comfort them, or haunt them.

The Characters

Core FeaturesDifferent Characters, Different Desires

Every renter has their own secret preferences and emotional triggers.

Your task as the ghost is to observe, learn, and act — discover what they crave to make them stay… or push them away forever.

Animated LEWD and SEX Scenes

Beautifully animated sequences that bring the most intimate dreams to life — each reflecting the renter’s personality and your choices. 

Dream & Nightmare SequencesTrack your tenant’s emotional state. High Heart unlocks fantasy dream scenes, high Fear unlocks nightmare sequences. Each dream or nightmare is split into multiple stages. Unlock the next scene by reaching the right emotional threshold or replaying with different approaches.​

 Interactive Apartment​​​Use doors, mirrors, showers, beds, lights, and everyday items to haunt creatively.
description_short: A choice-driven haunting game where every action shifts Heart or Fear, leading tenants to stay, leave, or dream of you in unexpected ways.
